title: Waypointer
body:
# Waypointer

Fabric mod for Hypixel Skyblock that aims to be the best possible waypoint manager.
Built for Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric, client-only).

## Features

- Ordered routes
- World rendering
- Subwaypoints
- Supports all waypoint formats (If you find one that doesn't work, make a github issue)
- Extremely compact import/export format
- Importable from chat messages
- Keybindings
- UI for editing and route management
- Waypoint skipping
- Works with shaders
- Export waypoints for other mods
- Super fast route creator / waypoint mover
- Extremely performant

![Route editor menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cf8f20fd2dbe1a681652dabb15ba451ba18f4e1.jpeg)

## Demo Video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DjMMHREPLbs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Waypoint Import Compatibility 

- Coleweight
- Skytils
- Skyblocker
- Soopy
- SkyHanni
- Generic JSON-based

![Route waypoint example in Galatea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be78545d7763b080c2cfa959c47c482f8e26da31.jpeg)


## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader 0.18.2+
- [Fabric API 0.141.4+](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [owo-lib 0.13.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib) 0.13.0+
- [Hypixel Mod API](https://modrinth.com/mod/hypixel-mod-api) 1.0.2+

## AI Generated Code Disclosure

This project contains code generated by large language models, though all code was reviewed, and approved, by me. **It is not vibe coded.**
I am liable for any issue with the mod. If you find issues or improvements with the code, please do feel free to submit an issue.
I included this disclosure because some people frown upon AI generated code, and felt the need to clarify for those who do not want to support it.
